item.title: Shmaltz Brewing: He’Brew Rejewvenator 2010, Ep. 148
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
At Beer America TV we love the seasonal beers, and we’ve always been BIG fans of the Shmaltz Brewing Company. Thanks to their PR man Jesse Cutler and their awesome Southern Region Sales Manager Darren Quinlan, we were able to get our hands on Rejewvenator 2010. This beer is described as half doppelbock, half Belgian […]

The post Shmaltz Brewing: He’Brew Rejewvenator 2010, Ep. 148 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 36 – Allagash White
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Picked as some of our favorite beers in 2008, Allagash Brewing Company’s “White” is a popular choice among their legions of fans . This cloudy but light tasting Belgian wheat style beer is easy to drink and very smooth – it also goes great with a wide variety of foods.

The post Episode 36 – Allagash White first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 18 – Brother Thelonious
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Thelonious Monk is more then just a Jazz icon, he’s also the inspiration to North Coast Brewing’s Brother Thelonious Belgian style abby strong ale . As we continue the holiday theme, this is a classic example of choosing beer instead of wine to go with your holiday fare!

The post Episode 18 – Brother Thelonious first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Brooklyn Brewery Local 1, Ep. 17
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Garrett Oliver’s Brooklyn Brewery just may have created one of the finest Belgian style beers this country has ever tasted! 100% bottle re-fermented, Brooklyn Local 1  has a fine champagne finish, and of course, goes with a wide variety of food, which is perfect for the holiday season and beyond!

The post Brooklyn Brewery Local 1, Ep. 17 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
